nodes.label: Dragit app logo: a flat-design icon on a white background. A large periwinkle-blue arc curves from upper-left to lower-left, forming the right half of a 'D' shape. At each open end of the arc sits a filled purple-blue circle (top-left and bottom-left). Inside the arc, centered vertically, is a coral/salmon-pink pill shape (elongated vertical oval) with a darker rose-pink circle at its top, evoking a drag handle or cursor being grabbed — visually representing drag-and-drop interaction. Color palette: periwinkle/medium blue (#6B6BD1 range) and coral/salmon pink (#E07070 range). Style: flat, minimal, no text.
